user.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Login (Step 1 of 2)
user.description:
**How to log in:**

1. Copy the URL from the field below
2. Open it in your browser
3. Log in with your **Bosch SingleKey ID**
4. Browser shows a **404 page** — this is expected
5. Copy the **full URL** from the address bar
6. Click **Submit** to continue

data_description.login_url: Copy this URL and open it in your browser to log in.

auth.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Paste URL (Step 2 of 2)
auth.description:
Paste the redirect URL from your browser address bar below.

**Important:** The code expires after ~60 seconds.

data_description.redirect_url: The full URL from the browser address bar after login (contains the authorization code)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Bosch Smart Home Camera
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Bosch Cloud token has expired and cannot be refreshed automatically. This usually happens when the refresh token was invalidated on Bosch's side.

Click **Submit** to open the Bosch SingleKey ID login in your browser. After login you'll be redirected back to Home Assistant automatically and your existing configuration (entities, automations, options) will be preserved.

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found in the URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed — the code may have expired. Try again.

abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful — your Bosch Smart Home Camera integration has been updated with a fresh token. All entities, automations, and options are preserved.

data.high_quality_video: High quality video (30 Mbps) — default for stream quality
data.fcm_push_mode: FCM Push Mode (auto / android / ios / polling)
data.audio_default_on: Audio ON by default when starting stream
data.debug_logging: Debug logging (verbose TLS proxy & stream logs)

data_description.scan_interval: How often the integration fetches data from the Bosch cloud. Lower = faster, more API calls. Default: 60
data_description.interval_status: How often cameras are pinged for ONLINE/OFFLINE. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.interval_events: How often to check for new motion/audio events. With FCM Push this is only a fallback. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.snapshot_interval: How often to proactively refresh camera snapshots. Range: 300–86400. Default: 1800 (30 min)
data_description.enable_snapshots: Show the latest motion-triggered JPEG as a camera entity in HA.
data_description.enable_sensors: Create sensor entities for camera status, WiFi signal, firmware, events today, last event, etc.
data_description.enable_snapshot_button: Create switch and button entities: Live Stream, Audio, Privacy Mode, Camera Light, Notifications, Refresh.
data_description.enable_binary_sensors: Create binary sensors that turn ON for 30 seconds after a motion or audio alarm event. Useful for automations.
data_description.enable_auto_download: Download event snapshots (JPEG) and video clips (MP4) from the Bosch cloud and save them locally on the HA host. Requires the download folder path below.
data_description.download_path: Local folder path for auto-downloaded events. Example: /config/bosch_events
data_description.enable_fcm_push: Receive motion/audio events in ~2 seconds via Firebase Cloud Messaging instead of polling every 5 minutes. Automatic fallback to polling if FCM goes down. Recommended!
data_description.alert_notify_service: Default fallback: used when the per-type fields below are empty. Comma-separated. Examples: notify.signal_messenger, notify.mobile_app_xxx. Leave empty to disable alerts.
data_description.alert_notify_system: Services for system alerts (token expired, disk full). Empty = uses default fallback above.
data_description.alert_notify_information: Services for step 1 — instant text notification. Empty = default fallback. e.g.: notify.signal_messenger, notify.mobile_app_xxx.
data_description.alert_notify_screenshot: Services for step 2 — snapshot image. Empty = skip this step (no fallback). Mobile apps (mobile_app_xxx) receive the image inline; others as file attachment.
data_description.alert_notify_video: Services for step 3 — video clip. Empty = skip this step (no fallback).
data_description.alert_save_snapshots: Keep downloaded event images and videos in www/bosch_alerts/ (inside the HA config dir). If OFF, files are deleted within seconds after sending.
data_description.alert_delete_after_send: Remove local files after the notification service has received them. Only applies when 'Save locally' is OFF.
data_description.high_quality_video: Set the default stream quality to 30 Mbps (instead of Auto ~7.5 Mbps). Can be overridden at runtime via the 'Video Quality' select entity.
data_description.stream_connection_type:
Default connection type for live streams.
• **auto** (recommended): Try local LAN first, automatically fall back to Bosch cloud proxy on failure.
• **local**: Direct LAN only — no internet required. Faster RTSP, but slower snapshots (~6–10 s). Session auto-renewed every 50 s.
• **remote**: Always via Bosch cloud proxy. Faster snapshots (~0.4–1.9 s). Best default when HA is not on the same LAN.
The 'Stream Mode' select entity overrides this setting at runtime without restart.
data_description.live_buffer_mode:
How many seconds of video the player pre-buffers before showing it. More buffer = fewer stutters but larger lag behind real time.
• **Latency**: small buffer (~4-6 s lag). May stutter on flaky Wi-Fi.
• **Balanced** (recommended): medium buffer (~8-10 s). Robust against typical Wi-Fi hiccups.
• **Stable**: large buffer (~12-15 s). Smooth even on weak links, but noticeably delayed.
Affects only the card display — has no effect on the camera, recording, or snapshots.
data_description.shc_ip: Smart Home Controller IP for local API features (e.g. 192.168.1.100). Optional — most features work without SHC.
data_description.shc_cert_path: Path to client certificate PEM file for SHC mutual TLS. Example: /config/shc_cert.pem
data_description.shc_key_path: Path to client key PEM file for SHC mutual TLS. Example: /config/shc_key.pem
data_description.fcm_push_mode: Choose push mode. Auto tries iOS first, then Android, then falls back to polling. Polling uses standard API calls only (no FCM).
data_description.audio_default_on: When ON: audio switch starts enabled (stream with sound). When OFF: audio starts muted. Can be toggled anytime in the dashboard.
data_description.enable_intercom: Enable the intercom (two-way audio) switch entity. Disabled by default. Allows sending audio to the camera speaker.
data_description.enable_go2rtc: Automatically register live streams with HA's bundled go2rtc for WebRTC playback (~2 s latency vs. ~10 s HLS). Recommended. Disable only if you run a custom go2rtc setup.
data_description.enable_smb_upload: Upload event snapshots and video clips to an SMB/CIFS or FTP network share (e.g. FRITZ!Box NAS, Synology, any Windows share). SMB requires the smbprotocol package; FTP uses Python's built-in ftplib.
data_description.upload_protocol: Transfer protocol. **SMB** (default) is the typical Windows/macOS share. **FTP** is significantly faster on many NAS devices (e.g. FRITZ!Box) for lots of small files and sidesteps the known macOS-Sequoia SMB-rename hang. With FTP the share-name field is ignored; the base path is relative to the FTP root (e.g. `FILES/Bosch-Kameras` instead of just `Bosch-Kameras`).
data_description.smb_server: IP address or hostname. Example: 192.168.1.1 (FRITZ!Box), nas.local or fritz.box
data_description.smb_share: Name of the SMB share (SMB only). Example: FRITZ.NAS
data_description.smb_base_path: Base folder on the share where files are stored. Default: Bosch-Kameras
data_description.smb_file_pattern: File name pattern (without extension). Variables: {camera}, {date}, {time}, {type}, {id}, {year}, {month}, {day}. Default: {camera}_{date}_{time}_{type}_{id}
data_description.smb_retention_days: Automatically delete files on the NAS older than this many days. 0 = keep forever. Default: 180 (6 months). Runs once per day.
data_description.smb_disk_warn_mb: Send an alert when free space on the NAS share falls below this threshold in MB. 0 = disabled. Default: 5120 MB (5 GB). Uses configured notify service, falls back to HA notification.
data_description.debug_logging: Enable verbose logging for TLS proxy RTSP exchanges, stream timing, and pre-warm diagnostics. Useful for troubleshooting LOCAL stream issues. Disable for normal use.
data_description.force_relogin: Check this to re-authenticate via browser. Only needed if the refresh token has expired (very rare).
data_description.migrate_to_oss_client: Switch from the legacy `residential_app` client to the dedicated `oss_residential_app` client Bosch provides for open source integrations. Enabling this will trigger the reauth flow — you will be asked to log in once via Bosch SingleKey ID, and your existing entities, automations, and options will be preserved.

relogin_show.title: Re-login — Step 1 of 2
relogin_show.description: Copy the URL below, open in browser, log in, then click Submit.

data_description.login_url: Copy and open in your browser.

relogin_paste.title: Re-login — Step 2 of 2
relogin_paste.description: Paste the redirect URL. **Code expires in ~60 seconds!**

data_description.redirect_url: Full URL from browser address bar after login (contains the authorization code)

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found. Paste the full URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed — code expired. Try again.

abort.migration_started: Migration started — please complete the Reconfigure flow on the integration card.

live_stream.name: Live Stream
live_stream.description: Starts or stops the live RTSP stream. When on, the camera streams continuously to Home Assistant. Turning off immediately closes the session and stops the TLS proxy.

audio.name: Audio
audio.description: Enables or mutes audio on the live stream. When on, the stream includes AAC-LC audio. If a live stream is already active, toggling this re-opens the connection immediately.

camera_light.name: Camera Light
camera_light.description: Turns the camera indicator LED on or off. Only available for cameras that have a physical light (featureSupport.light = true).

front_light.name: Front Light
front_light.description: Turns the front spotlight on or off independently of the wallwasher LEDs. Only available for cameras with a physical light.

wallwasher.name: Wallwasher
wallwasher.description: Turns the top and bottom ambient LED lights on or off. On Gen2 cameras these are the RGB accent lights; on Gen1 this is the wallwasher LED strip.

privacy_mode.name: Privacy Mode
privacy_mode.description: When on, the camera shutter closes and the camera stops recording and streaming. Controlled via the Bosch cloud API — works without an SHC configured.

notifications.name: Notifications
notifications.description: Enables or disables push notifications for this camera. When on, notifications follow the camera schedule (FOLLOW_CAMERA_SCHEDULE). When off, notifications are always suppressed.

motion_detection.name: Motion Detection
motion_detection.description: Enables or disables motion detection. Note: the camera's on-device IVA rules may revert this setting within seconds if conflicting rules exist.

record_sound.name: Record Sound
record_sound.description: Enables or disables audio recording in cloud event clips. When off, recorded video clips contain no sound.

auto_follow.name: Auto Follow
auto_follow.description: Enables automatic pan-tracking: the camera pans to follow detected motion. Only available for the CAMERA_360 indoor model.

intercom.name: Intercom
intercom.description: Enables two-way audio so you can speak through the camera speaker. Disabled by default — enable in Settings under Entities.

privacy_sound.name: Privacy Sound
privacy_sound.description: When on, the camera plays an audible tone whenever privacy mode changes. Only supported on indoor cameras (CAMERA_360, HOME_Eyes_Indoor).

timestamp_overlay.name: Timestamp Overlay
timestamp_overlay.description: Shows or hides the date and time overlay on the camera video feed.

status_led.name: Status LED
status_led.description: Turns the status LED on or off. This is the LED that indicates the camera is recording or active. Gen2 cameras only.

motion_light.name: Motion Light
motion_light.description: When on, the camera lights turn on automatically when motion is detected. Gen2 cameras only.

ambient_light.name: Ambient Light
ambient_light.description: When on, camera lights stay on according to the configured schedule (dusk-to-dawn or manual times). Gen2 cameras only.

soft_light_fading.name: Soft Light Fading
soft_light_fading.description: When on, lights fade in and out smoothly instead of switching instantly. Gen2 cameras only.

intrusion_detection.name: Intrusion Detection
intrusion_detection.description: Enables or disables DualRadar 180° 3D intrusion detection with person recognition. Gen2 cameras only. Cannot be changed while privacy mode is active.

alarm_system_arm.name: Alarm System
alarm_system_arm.description: Arms or disarms the integrated alarm system. When armed, detected intrusion triggers the built-in 75 dB siren. Gen2 Indoor II only.

alarm_mode.name: Siren
alarm_mode.description: Enables or disables the main alarm siren. When off, the alarm system is armed but no audible siren fires on intrusion. Gen2 Indoor II only.

pre_alarm.name: Pre-Alarm
pre_alarm.description: Enables or disables the LED warning phase that runs before the siren activates. Gives occupants time to disarm before the siren sounds. Gen2 Indoor II only.

audio_alarm.name: Sound Detection
audio_alarm.description: Enables or disables sound-level detection. When on, an event is triggered when ambient noise exceeds the configured threshold. This is the free tier detection, not the Audio+ premium subscription.

pan_position.name: Pan Position
pan_position.description: Pans the 360 camera left or right. Range depends on camera model (typically -120° to +120°). Only available for CAMERA_360.

audio_threshold.name: Audio Threshold
audio_threshold.description: Sound level in dB that triggers an audio alarm event. Range 0–100 dB. Lower value = more sensitive.

speaker_level.name: Speaker Level
speaker_level.description: Volume of the camera speaker used for the intercom (two-way audio). Range 0–100%.

front_light_intensity.name: Front Light Intensity
front_light_intensity.description: Brightness of the front spotlight as a percentage (0–100%). Only available for cameras with a physical light.

lens_elevation.name: Lens Elevation
lens_elevation.description: Mounting height of the camera lens in meters (0.5–5.0 m). Used by the camera for perspective correction in person detection. Gen2 only.

microphone_level.name: Microphone Level
microphone_level.description: Microphone recording volume (0–100%). Affects audio in live streams and event recordings. Gen2 only.

white_balance.name: Front Light Color Temperature
white_balance.description: Color temperature of the front spotlight from cool (-1.0) to warm (+1.0). 0.0 is neutral white. Gen2 outdoor cameras only.

top_led_brightness.name: Top LED Brightness
top_led_brightness.description: Brightness of the upper RGB accent LEDs (0–100%). Gen2 outdoor cameras only.

bottom_led_brightness.name: Bottom LED Brightness
bottom_led_brightness.description: Brightness of the lower RGB accent LEDs (0–100%). Gen2 outdoor cameras only.

motion_light_sensitivity.name: Motion Light Sensitivity
motion_light_sensitivity.description: How sensitive the motion-triggered lighting is (1 = low, 5 = high). A higher value triggers the lights at smaller movements. Gen2 outdoor cameras only.

darkness_threshold.name: Darkness Threshold
darkness_threshold.description: The ambient brightness level below which the camera switches to night lighting mode (0–100%). 0 = always day mode, 100 = always night mode. Gen2 outdoor cameras only.

power_led_brightness.name: Power LED Brightness
power_led_brightness.description: Brightness of the white power indicator LED (0–4 steps, 0 = off). This is the LED showing that the camera is powered on, distinct from the red status LED. Gen2 Indoor II only.

alarm_delay.name: Siren Duration
alarm_delay.description: How long the 75 dB siren stays active after being triggered, in seconds. Gen2 Indoor II only.

alarm_activation_delay.name: Alarm Activation Delay
alarm_activation_delay.description: Time in seconds between intrusion detection and siren activation. Gives occupants time to disarm. Gen2 Indoor II only.

pre_alarm_delay.name: Pre-Alarm Duration
pre_alarm_delay.description: How long the LED warning phase runs before the siren fires, in seconds. Gen2 Indoor II only.

audio_alarm_sensitivity.name: Sound Detection Sensitivity
audio_alarm_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity of the sound-level detection (0–10). Higher values detect quieter sounds. Gen2 Indoor II only. Write-only — the API does not echo this value back.

refresh_snapshot.name: Refresh Snapshot
refresh_snapshot.description: Forces an immediate data and image refresh for this camera without waiting for the next scheduled polling interval.

acoustic_alarm.name: Siren
acoustic_alarm.description: Triggers the built-in camera siren. If the camera model does not support this, the action is silently ignored.

video_quality.name: Video Quality
video_quality.description: Stream quality for live video. Auto uses 7.5 Mbps; High uses 30 Mbps; Low uses 1.9 Mbps.

motion_sensitivity.name: Motion Sensitivity
motion_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level for motion detection. SUPER_HIGH triggers on the slightest movement; LOW only triggers on significant motion.

fcm_push_mode.name: FCM Push Mode
fcm_push_mode.description: How the integration receives motion and audio events. Auto tries iOS, then Android, then falls back to periodic polling.

stream_mode.name: Stream Mode
stream_mode.description: Connection type for live streams. Auto tries the local LAN first and falls back to the Bosch cloud proxy. Changes take effect on the next stream start.

detection_mode.name: Detection Mode
detection_mode.description: What the intrusion detection system reacts to. ALL_MOTIONS triggers on any movement; ONLY_HUMANS only triggers on detected persons; ZONES restricts detection to configured areas. Gen2 only.

motion.name: Motion
motion.description: Turns on for 90 seconds after a MOVEMENT event is detected. Useful for automations. Enable in Settings under Entities.

audio_alarm_binary.name: Audio Alarm
audio_alarm_binary.description: Turns on for 90 seconds after an AUDIO_ALARM event is detected. Only available for cameras with sound detection (featureSupport.sound = true).

person_detected.name: Person Detected
person_detected.description: Turns on for 90 seconds after a PERSON event is detected by the cloud AI.

firmware_update.name: Firmware
firmware_update.description: Shows the installed firmware version and whether a newer version is available. Firmware updates must be installed via the Bosch Smart Home app.

top_led_light.name: Top LED
top_led_light.description: Upper RGB accent LED on Gen2 outdoor cameras. Supports full color and brightness control. Part of the wallwasher lighting group.

bottom_led_light.name: Bottom LED
bottom_led_light.description: Lower RGB accent LED on Gen2 outdoor cameras. Supports full color and brightness control. Part of the wallwasher lighting group.

front_light_entity.name: Front Light
front_light_entity.description: Front spotlight on Gen2 outdoor cameras. Supports brightness and color temperature (cool to warm white). Does not support RGB color.

status.name: Status
status.description: Whether the camera is reachable by the Bosch cloud.

last_event.name: Last Event
last_event.description: Timestamp of the most recent motion or audio event recorded by the camera.

events_today.name: Events Today
events_today.description: Number of motion and audio events that occurred since midnight today.

wifi_signal.name: WiFi Signal
wifi_signal.description: Current WiFi signal strength as a percentage (0–100%). Attributes include SSID and IP address.

firmware_version.name: Firmware Version
firmware_version.description: Installed firmware version reported by the camera. Attribute 'up_to_date' indicates whether an update is available.

ambient_light.name: Ambient Light
ambient_light.description: Ambient brightness detected by the camera's light sensor, expressed as a percentage (0–100%).

led_dimmer.name: LED Dimmer
led_dimmer.description: Current brightness of the camera's LED spotlight (0–100%), read via RCP. Only available for cameras with a physical light.

clock_offset.name: Clock Offset
clock_offset.description: Difference in seconds between the camera's internal clock and the Home Assistant server clock. Large values indicate clock drift.

motion_sensitivity.name: Motion Sensitivity
motion_sensitivity.description: Motion detection state and configured sensitivity level. Disabled when motion detection is turned off in the Bosch app.

audio_alarm.name: Audio Alarm
audio_alarm.description: Audio alarm detection state and threshold. Shows whether sound-triggered alerts are enabled.

last_event_type.name: Last Event Type
last_event_type.description: Category of the most recent event — movement, person detection, audio alarm, or trouble.

movement_events_today.name: Movement Events Today
movement_events_today.description: Number of MOVEMENT-type events detected today.

audio_events_today.name: Audio Events Today
audio_events_today.description: Number of AUDIO_ALARM-type events detected today.

push_status.name: Event Detection
push_status.description: Shows whether events are received via instant FCM push (~2 s) or via periodic polling. One sensor per integration, not per camera.

unread_events.name: Unread Events
unread_events.description: Number of events that have not yet been marked as read in the Bosch app.

commissioned.name: Commissioned
commissioned.description: Commissioning status reported by the Bosch cloud: whether the camera is configured, connected, and fully commissioned.

schedule_rules.name: Schedule Rules
schedule_rules.description: Number of cloud-side schedule rules defined for this camera (e.g. privacy or recording schedules). Attributes list each rule with name and active state.

alarm_catalog.name: Alarm Catalog
alarm_catalog.description: Number of alarm types supported by the camera firmware, read via RCP. Attributes list all types with name and category.

motion_zones.name: Motion Zones
motion_zones.description: Number of configured motion detection zones. Attributes contain zone geometry data for overlay visualisation.

tls_cert.name: TLS Certificate
tls_cert.description: Expiry date of the camera's TLS certificate. Attributes include issuer, key size, and validity period.

network_services.name: Network Services
network_services.description: Number of active network services on the camera (HTTP, HTTPS, RTSP, ONVIF, NTP, etc.), read via RCP.

iva_analytics.name: IVA Analytics
iva_analytics.description: Number of Intelligent Video Analytics modules available in the camera firmware, read via RCP.

privacy_masks.name: Privacy Masks
privacy_masks.description: Number of configured privacy mask areas. Attributes contain mask geometry for overlay visualisation.

ambient_schedule.name: Ambient Light Schedule
ambient_schedule.description: Ambient light schedule mode for Gen2 outdoor cameras: dusk-to-dawn (automatic) or manual times. Attributes include brightness and colour temperature settings.

alarm_state.name: Alarm State
alarm_state.description: Intrusion alarm state of the Gen2 Indoor II camera. ACTIVE means the alarm is armed.

stream_status.name: Stream Status
stream_status.description: Current live stream state of the camera.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Open a live stream proxy connection (H.264 30fps + AAC audio).

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud UUID of the camera (find in entity attributes)
